prompt_text: SCENE_12. Shot medium shot, eye-level, vertical 9:16 framing, inner-glow lens. Style: Cinematic 3D art with strong contrast and a divine glow effect. Characters and objects are illustrated with Warm light illuminating the monk's face and hands. Movements are Slow pulsing light effect. Character consistency lock: Character 'Young Ascetic Monk': consistent young Buddhist monk, shaved head, calm and focused expression. Scene action: A monk meditates in a dark forest shrine, his heart area glowing with a warm, golden light. Environment and background: A traditional stone shrine deep in a misty forest at night. Mood and atmosphere: Spiritual and blissful. Motion details: Pulsing of the golden light from the monk's chest.
